scripts.validate: npm run build && node dist/src/cli/index.js validate
scripts.dry-run: npm run build && node dist/src/cli/index.js dry-run
scripts.daemon: npm run build && node dist/src/cli/index.js daemon
scripts.validate:mock: npm run build && node dist/src/cli/index.js validate examples/WORKFLOW.quickstart.mock.md
scripts.dry-run:mock: npm run build && node dist/src/cli/index.js dry-run examples/WORKFLOW.quickstart.mock.md
scripts.daemon:mock: npm run build && node dist/src/cli/index.js daemon examples/WORKFLOW.dashboard.mock.example.md
scripts.daemon:mock:once: npm run build && node dist/src/cli/index.js daemon examples/WORKFLOW.quickstart.mock.md --max-cycles 1
scripts.docker:validate: npm run docker:build && mkdir -p config workspaces logs && cp examples/WORKFLOW.docker.mock.example.md config/WORKFLOW.md && cp examples/mock-issues.json config/mock-issues.json && docker compose run --rm orchestrator validate /config/WORKFLOW.md
scripts.docker:dry-run: npm run docker:build && mkdir -p config workspaces logs && cp examples/WORKFLOW.docker.mock.example.md config/WORKFLOW.md && cp examples/mock-issues.json config/mock-issues.json && docker compose run --rm orchestrator dry-run /config/WORKFLOW.md
